prompt: Create a vertical anime-style cinematic portrait of an elegant young woman in a glowing night garden, shown in close-up side profile from the chest up as she quietly savors whiskey. She has dark navy-black loosely pinned into a messy low bun with wispy strands across her face, warm amber rim light catching the hair, refined features, long eyelashes, and a calm relaxed Friday-night mood. She wears a deep midnight blue kimono-like robe, a delicate gold pendant necklace, and long dangling gold earrings. Her right hand lifts a cut-crystal tumbler to her lips; the glass contains amber whiskey, with sparkling highlights, facets, and golden reflections. Surround her with exactly 8 prominent glowing yellow evening primrose blossoms: 1 large blurred blossom on the far left background, 1 small blurred blossom near the left middle background, 2 blossoms near the upper right, 1 blossom at mid-right beside her shoulder, 1 blossom in the lower right foreground, 1 blossom centered near her chest, and 1 blossom near the lower center foreground; add additional tiny golden bokeh particles but no extra distinct foreground flowers. Use dramatic warm golden flower light against a deep blue night background, shallow depth of field, soft painterly detail, elegant romantic atmosphere, luminous petals, realistic glass refraction, subtle firefly-like specks, and a high-detail polished illustration finish. No text, no watermark, no border.
promptEn: Create a vertical anime-style cinematic portrait of an elegant young woman in a glowing night garden, shown in close-up side profile from the chest up as she quietly savors whiskey. She has dark navy-black loosely pinned into a messy low bun with wispy strands across her face, warm amber rim light catching the hair, refined features, long eyelashes, and a calm relaxed Friday-night mood. She wears a deep midnight blue kimono-like robe, a delicate gold pendant necklace, and long dangling gold earrings. Her right hand lifts a cut-crystal tumbler to her lips; the glass contains amber whiskey, with sparkling highlights, facets, and golden reflections. Surround her with exactly 8 prominent glowing yellow evening primrose blossoms: 1 large blurred blossom on the far left background, 1 small blurred blossom near the left middle background, 2 blossoms near the upper right, 1 blossom at mid-right beside her shoulder, 1 blossom in the lower right foreground, 1 blossom centered near her chest, and 1 blossom near the lower center foreground; add additional tiny golden bokeh particles but no extra distinct foreground flowers. Use dramatic warm golden flower light against a deep blue night background, shallow depth of field, soft painterly detail, elegant romantic atmosphere, luminous petals, realistic glass refraction, subtle firefly-like specks, and a high-detail polished illustration finish. No text, no watermark, no border.
promptZh: 创作一张竖屏动漫风格的电影感肖像，主角是 一位优雅的年轻女性，背景为发光的夜间花园。画面采用胸部以上的侧面特写，展现她静静品味威士忌的瞬间。她留着 深藏青黑色 的头发，随意盘成凌乱的低发髻，几缕发丝散落在脸颊旁，温暖的琥珀色轮廓光映照在发丝上；她五官精致，睫毛修长，呈现出周五夜晚宁静放松的氛围。她身穿深 午夜蓝 的和服式长袍，佩戴着精致的金色吊坠项链和长款垂坠金耳环。她的右手将一只切割水晶杯举至唇边；杯中盛着 琥珀色威士忌，带有闪烁的高光、切面和金色倒影。周围环绕着 8 朵显眼的发光黄色月见草：左侧远景处 1 朵模糊的大花，左中背景处 1 朵模糊的小花，右上角附近 2 朵，右侧肩膀旁 1 朵，右下角前景处 1 朵，胸前中心位置 1 朵，以及下部中心前景处 1 朵；添加额外的细小金色光斑，但不要添加其他明显的近景花朵。采用深蓝色夜空背景与戏剧性的暖金色花朵光效，浅景深，柔和的绘画质感，优雅浪漫的氛围，发光的花瓣，逼真的玻璃折射效果，细微的萤火虫般光点，以及高细节的精致插画质感。无文字，无水印，无边框。
